问题导向句式: However, obtaining the shape of glossy objects like metals, plastics or ceramics remains challenging, since standard Lambertian cues cannot be easily applied.
Inferring the depth of transparent or mirror (ToM) surfaces represents a hard challenge for either sensors, algorithms, or deep networks.
对比句式: While other methods generate visible artifacts, especially around the most specular parts.
In contrast, our model can work on general 1-lobe BRDFs and can also recover reflectance in addition to shape.
递进/连接句式: After this equation is derived, we recover the shape by applying a locally polynomial shape prior (Sec. 5.1).
First, we mask ToM objects in images by in-painting them with arbitrary uniform colors. Then, we employ a monocular depth network to generate a virtual depth map.

段落开头引入方式: 问题提出式：'Light-field cameras have recently emerged as a powerful tool... However, obtaining the shape... remains challenging.'
方法声明式：'In this paper, we propose a simple pipeline...'
理论背景式：'Light fields implicitly capture the 3D geometry and reflectance properties...'
段内论证逻辑: 先总后分结构：先总结方法贡献，再分点展开（如贡献列表1-5项）
对比论证：将现有方法与本方法进行对比分析（如'Tao et al. [27] proposed a clustering method that eliminates specular pixels...'）
因果推导：从理论假设推导到具体实现（如'Given the challenge of acquiring the ground truth disparity maps...'）
段落结尾收束方式: 贡献总结：'Our main contributions are: 1)... 5)...'
展望过渡：'We demonstrate extensive real-world examples of shape and reflectance estimation using commercial light-field cameras (Figs. 1, 7, and 8).'
问题呼应：'This difficulty arises because ToM surfaces introduce misleading visual information about scene geometry...'（在引言结尾呼应开头问题）

用词特征: 过渡词：however, therefore, furthermore, notably, consequently
强调词：novel, key, fundamental, significant, state-of-the-art
限定词：spatially-varying (SV), Lambertian, monocular, stereo, synthetic
学术短语：Epipolar Plane Images (EPI), photometric loss, self-supervised methods, in-painting, fine-tune
论证模式: 问题-分析-解决方案模式：先指出现有方法局限（如'Tao et al. [27]... fails if the BRDFs do not lie on a line'），分析原因（dichromatic model失效），提出新方案（SVBRDF-invariant理论）
方法分层说明模式：按技术模块分述（如decoupling模块和aggregating模块的结构功能）
实验验证模式：先描述数据集构建（synthetic MERL dataset），再对比实验结果（Figs. 5-8）

嵌入方式: 句中引用：'Tao et al. [27] proposed a clustering method...'
句末引用：'Most work assumes a known light source [10, 33].'（隐式引用）
多引用合并：'[18]–[21]'（连续引用格式）
衔接方式: 对比衔接：'Unlike previous approaches, our method...'
因果衔接：'Due to the limitations of existing methods [9,13], we...'（隐含引用作用）
补充说明：'（Sec. 5.1）'（章节引用引导）
